name: Don Bacon
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $2,967,090 for Don Bacon in U.S. House, NE-02. Public statements and congressional records indicate this candidate has taken a stance aligned with Israel-focused security policy framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
